info.title: SKU.io — Create a Sales Order
info.description: Create a new sales order in SKU.io with one or more line items. Use this to place an order for a customer — capturing the order status, order date, optional customer and store, and the SKUs, quantities, and unit prices being sold. Resolve products first with find-product so each line references a real product.

post.summary: Create a sales order with header fields and an array of line items.

order_status.description: Order status. Use "draft" for an unconfirmed order (lines optional); any other status requires at least one line. Common values include draft, open/confirmed.

order_date.description: Order date (ISO-8601). Defaults to now if omitted by the client.

customer_id.description: Existing customer id to attach the order to.

store_id.description: Store/sales-channel id the order belongs to.

sales_order_lines.description: Array of line items. Required unless order_status is "draft". Each line: { description (required), quantity (required), amount (required unit price), product_id or sku (to link a catalog product), warehouse_id (optional) }.
